summary:
The patient’s presentation suggests croup; thus, administering high-dose dexamethasone is recommended as it effectively reduces airway swelling quickly. Close monitoring after treatment initiation remains crucial.
``` ```plaintext
The patient shows signs indicative of croup, so administration of high-dose dexamethasone is indicated to reduce airway swelling promptly. Continuous close monitoring post-treatment is essential.
```
